description: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic mentioning the sale of an unnamed item and a document as well as 'the honorable brother' R. Mikha'el (Michael). The recto (B 5881-1) bears partially obscured jottings in Arabic script, possibly a list or account with Coptic numerals indicating amounts, perhaps associated with the contents of this text.
description_he: קטע מכתב ביהודית-ערבית על מכירת פריט ומסמך, ומזכיר את ר' מיכאל
